text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
So this is what charms people so... The suspense
of the game makes the prize exciting in a way
simply buying a toy doesn't.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I must also say, Trainer, you showed a surgical
level of skill operating the claw. I shall give this
plush pride of place in my room.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I can hardly wait to look upon it with
Chiyono O.
